title: Stewardship Digest
description: Weekly stewardship report. Snapshots release-over-release deltas in catalogue counts, quality-tier mix, coverage, leaderboard movers, plus open audit warnings and stale-UC review backlog. Emitted by python3 -m splunk_uc generate-stewardship-digest and gated in CI by tests/scripts/test_generate_stewardship_digest.py against this schema. Repo-overhaul plan §P8 step 4.

$schema.description: Path to this schema file; included so editors and validators can locate the contract from the artefact alone.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bump alongside any breaking change to this contract.

generatedAt.description: Wall-clock time when the digest was generated. Reproducibility-friendly: caller passes --reference-date so a CI fixture run produces stable output.

referenceDate.description: Logical 'as-of' date for staleness calculations. Defaults to today (UTC) but can be overridden via --reference-date for deterministic test fixtures.

current.description: Counts from the live dist/metrics.json (or --metrics input).

previous.description: Counts from the prior release snapshot in data/metrics-history/. Null when this is the first release ever captured.

deltas.description: Signed integer deltas (current - previous). Zeros across the board when previous is null.

qualityShifts.description: Gold/silver/bronze/none counts current vs. prior, and the signed deltas. Trends the headline quality story release over release.

coverageShifts.description: Per-coverage-axis (compliance / mitreAttack / cimModels / equipment / escuDetections / escuRiskBased / prerequisites) the current and prior count + percentage and signed deltas.

topMovers.description: Top 10 leaderboard entries sorted by absolute delta magnitude (descending), tie-broken alphabetically by name. Empty arrays when previous is null.

auditWarnings.description: Audits that exit 0 but emit WARN-level diagnostics (notably python3 -m splunk_uc audit-roadmap-consistency soft-fails). Captured here so they cannot rot silently.

thresholdDays.description: Age in days above which a UC is considered stale. Default 180 (six months); configurable via --stale-threshold-days.

count.description: Total number of UCs whose lastReviewed is older than thresholdDays.

byCategory.description: Stale-UC counts keyed by category number (string-cast for JSON).

topStale.description: Up to 20 oldest stale UCs (longest age first; tie-broken by UC id).

staleUseCases.description: Sidecar staleness rollup. Walks content/cat-*/UC-*.json and compares lastReviewed against referenceDate. UCs missing lastReviewed are treated as max-age stale so curators see them first.

version.description: Catalogue version recorded in this snapshot.

category.description: Category number as a string for JSON-safety.

lastReviewed.description: Null when the sidecar omits lastReviewed entirely; in that case ageDays is treated as 'maximum' so the UC bubbles to the top of topStale.

ageDays.description: Days since lastReviewed (or since referenceDate when lastReviewed is null, treated as +infinity then capped via sentinel).
